summary: SINGLE_FOCUS 2D version of the high-dimensional inner-sphere paradox. NumberPlane (-3..3) with RED 2x2 outer box; four YELLOW unit circles centered at (±1,±1). Draws the right triangle (GREEN legs of length 1, WHITE sqrt(2) diagonal) from origin to (1,1), then grows a GREEN inner circle of radius sqrt(2)-1 ≈ 0.414 tangent to all four corner circles. Right panel derivation: d_{0→(1,1)}=sqrt(2), r_inner=sqrt(2)-1, ≈0.414.
